titleStmt.title: SII 34.78: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 78. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman (Uttamachōḻa), 9th year, Dhanus, Thursday, Kṛittikā =A.D. 979.

Records a provision made for conducting the services śrībali and tiruppaḷḷi-eḻichchi in the temple of Tirunallūr-Paramēśvarar. For this purpose the peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya on the north bank decided to set apart one kuṟuṇi of paddy from out of the six kuṟuṇi being collected for the tank on every mā of the paddy fields of the village. All the four chēris of the village took part in the deiberations and attested the document through their respective madhyasthas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kōpparakēsari panmamarkku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu
vaṭakarai brahmatēyam śrī kāmaravallicaturve
timaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷōm I
vvāṭṭai dhaṉunāyaṟṟu viyāḻakkiḻamai pe
ṟṟa kārtikai nāṉṟu taṭṭaḻi koṭṭi peruṅ
kuṟi cāṟṟi maṇṭakattē kūṭi Eḻuntaruḷi Iru
ntu nam tirunallūr parameśvararkku cantrātit
tavaṟ śrīpaliyum tiruppaḷḷi Eḻucciyum koḷ
vataṟku peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷōm vaittukku
ṭutta jīvitamāvatu śrīkōtaṇṭarāma vāykkā
lkkīḻ nīrpūci nel viḷaiyum nilamellām
virivu māttāl tūṇippatakku nel Aṇaik
ku vaitta nellilē māttāl kuṟuṇi nel
pūttōṟum koḷḷa peṟuvatāka Av Av Āṇ
ṭu Ūrvāriyamceyyum perumakkaḷē teric
cu terippu puka Iṭa kaṭavarākavum
rippiṉpaṭi tēvakaṉmikaḷ kaṉavi
taṇṭikoḷḷa peṟuvārākavum I
pparicu Innel koṇṭu cantrātit
tavaṟ śrībali koṭṭuvataṟkāka pa
ṇippaṇiyāl nālu cēriyilum
nallūr bhaṭṭaṉ nakkanākaṉ paṇi
yālum kaṭavūr nārāyaṇaṉ nārāyaṇa
ṉ paṇiyālum kōmaṭattu tirukkuṟuṅ
kuṭikkramavittaṉ paṇiyālum kirāñci
kkampattipōḻ nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa
ṉ paṇiyālum Ipparicu cantrātittava
ṟ niṟppatāka śilālekhai ceytukuṭut
tōm peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom paṇi
yāl madhyastaṉ Amaṇa
maṅkalyaṉāṉa nūṟṟu
vaṉ muṉṉūṟṟuva
ṉēṉ Ivai yeṉne
ḻuttu .. Ippaṭi paṇi
yāl madhyastaṉ brahmapiri
yanēṉ Ippaṭi paṇi
yāl marutūr peruṅkāvi
tiyāṉa pūtaṉ śrīkaṇṭa
nēṉ ..
Ippaṭi paṇiyāl madhyasta
ṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ
nēṉ Ippaṭi paṇiyāl ma
dhyastaṉ tiruveḷḷarai pe
ruṅkāvitiyāna
Digital edition of SII 34.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
